title: Item Retextures
description: Makes tools look shinier and sharper
body:
This small pack changes a few textures to make tools look shinier and sharper. Everything the pack changes is in this picture below (the diamond item, log item and stone item are just there for illustration purposes. I haven't changed them):
  
![A preview of the resource pack showing edited textures for each tool set in the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/391a8c9260a2716cf9786e66c7be156b41cf6518.png)
  
When loading this pack on versions before 1.20.2, you will get an error message saying the pack is incompatible, but this can safely be ignored.

Legacy versions for 1.8 (compatible with any pre-1.13 game version) are available on the [Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/item-redesigns/files/all) page.

Need help, or have a question/request? [My discord server](https://discord.gg/GzKsDxpvPZ) is the best place to ask.
